name: Researcher Pack
summary: A synthesis-heavy pack for teams turning scattered evidence into dossiers, literature maps, and benchmark framing.
audience: Researchers, strategy teams, and analyst functions
use_cases: Orient quickly in a new domain
Separate credibility review from benchmark design
quick_start: Use Research Dossier for broad synthesis and Literature Map for early orientation.
Keep credibility and benchmark framing separate instead of mixing them into one document.
